Pool "bad-hash": skipped: invalid hash "sha512"
Keyspace "bad-merge": skipped: merge "not_registered" is neither a built-in nor an inline module in this snapshot
Keyspace "bad-policy": skipped: invalid writePolicy "quorum"
Keyspace "colon": skipped: prefix "a:b" must not contain ':'
Keyspace "dup-read": skipped: read lists pool "mc-a" twice
Keyspace "reserved": skipped: prefix "__udf" is reserved
Keyspace "uses-bad-pool": skipped: read[0] references unknown pool "bad-hash"
